title: Remove logrus.Infof on bindings start and attach
body:
We are only doing logrus.Info on a couple of bindings. I see no reason
to only do this on a couple, seems like debugging information more then
useful to the caller. We had a complaint about this so removing.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/13504

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]". That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
None

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

```
$ grep -r -E logrus.Info pkg/bindings/
pkg/bindings/containers/attach.go:      logrus.Infof("Going to attach to container %q", nameOrID)
pkg/bindings/containers/attach.go:                      logrus.Infof("Failed to resize TTY: %v", resizeErr)
pkg/bindings/containers/containers.go:  logrus.Infof("Going to start container %q", nameOrID)
pkg/bindings/connection.go:                     logrus.Info("Service did not provide Libpod-API-Version Header")
```

You are missing two info calls.

Also I think we need some form of CI test to prevent people from adding new info calls to the bindings.
The other two look like they could be warnings, but I am not sure why they are marked as info.  Perhaps they happen too often.
@mheon WDYT on https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/pkg/bindings/containers/attach.go#L57 Should we leave this change it to Warn or Debug?

> @mheon WDYT on https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/pkg/bindings/containers/attach.go#L57 Should we leave this change it to Warn or Debug?

looks like debug to me, definitely not warn
I would just remove it entirely.
@mheon then you would have no trace of the error?
Ehhhh. I don't really see that mattering much... But if we want to keep it, Debug is definitely the way to go. The container will still function (mostly) normally even without a successful resize.
